security.csp: default-src 'self' ipc: http://ipc.localhost; connect-src ipc: http://ipc.localhost https://*.youtube.com https://*.ytimg.com https://*.googlevideo.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.youtube.com https://*.ytimg.com https://*.ggpht.com; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; media-src https://*.youtube.com https://*.ytimg.com https://*.googlevideo.com blob:; script-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; worker-src blob:
